title: Add support for podman artifact inspect --format option.
body:
This matches the functionality of podman image inspect. Users can now
format the output using Go templates.

The implementation uses the report package to handle custom formats,
similar to other inspect commands. A simplified struct is provided
for autocomplete to expose the common top-level fields without
overwhelming users with deeply nested structure fields.

Changes:
- Add Format flag with -f short flag (default: json)
- Implement format handling using report.New() and Execute()
- Create artifactInspectFormat struct for autocomplete
- Update documentation with format placeholders and examples
- Add comprehensive tests for --format option

Examples of usage:
  podman artifact inspect --format '{{.Name}}' myartifact
  podman artifact inspect -f '{{.Digest}}' myartifact
  podman artifact inspect --format '{{index .Manifest.Annotations "org.opencontainers.image.created"}}' myartifact

```release-note
podman artifact inspect --format option now exists.
```
